rows.label: qev070104_MSG0001
rows.name:
Suddenly telling me to cross
through time... I'm interested,
but I still value my life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070104_MSG0002
rows.name:
I'm absolutely not doing it this
time. If he claims it's so safe,
Doc should just do it himself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070104_MSG0003
rows.name:
Th-This is NLA 3,000 years in
the future!! I feel like it
looks vaguely futuristic![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070104_MSG0004
rows.name: ...Hm!? Why are you in this era?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070104_MSG0005
rows.name: No... I get it! You're their descendant![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070104_MSG0006
rows.name:
You went out of your way to
come greet me. Thank you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070104_MSG0007
rows.name:
I wonder what happened on Mira
during these 3,000 years?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070104_MSG0008
rows.name:
The fact that the surrounding
scenery hasn't changed at all
is actually abnormal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070104_MSG0009
rows.name:
Yeah... I'll solve this
mystery! Because I'm a disciple
of science, just like Doc![ST:wait ]
